title: oenothera cespitosa var. marginata
intro: Oenothera cespitosa var. marginata, commonly known as fringed evening primrose, is a perennial plant species within the Onagraceae family, characterized by its fragrant, white flowers and fringed petals. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Oenothera cespitosa var. marginata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
